creator: jbacon@mcw.edu
text:
This is a multi-part message in MIME format.
 --------------040901080402010408050704
 Content-Type: text/plain; charset=ISO-8859-1; format=flowed
 Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
 
 
 Thanks to Ziad Saad, author of SUMA, the AFNI port is now patched to 
 work with Xorg 7.2.  I also made a number of other small enhancements.  
 New shar file attached.
 
     -Jason
 
 
 --------------040901080402010408050704
 Content-Type: text/plain;
  name="afni.shar"
 Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
 Content-Disposition: inline;
  filename="afni.shar"
 
 # This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
 # this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
 # create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
 # have default permissions.
 #
 # This archive contains:
 #
 #	science/afni
 #	science/afni/files
 #	science/afni/files/Makefile.FreeBSD_PORT
 #	science/afni/files/patch-Makefile.INCLUDE
 #	science/afni/files/patch-SUMA-SUMA_xColBar.c
 #	science/afni/files/patch-SUMA-SUMA_display.c
 #	science/afni/pkg-descr
 #	science/afni/pkg-message
 #	science/afni/pkg-plist
 #	science/afni/distinfo
 #	science/afni/Makefile
 #
 echo c - science/afni
 mkdir -p science/afni > /dev/null 2>&1
 echo c - science/afni/files
 mkdir -p science/afni/files > /dev/null 2>&1
 echo x - science/afni/files/Makefile.FreeBSD_PORT
 sed 's/^X//' >science/afni/files/Makefile.FreeBSD_PORT << 'END-of-science/afni/files/Makefile.FreeBSD_PORT'
 X##################################################################
 X#
 X# This Makefile is tested with FreeBSD 5.x
 X#
 X# Contributed by: 
 X#   Jason W. Bacon
 X#   Medical College of Wisconsin
 X#   bacon@smithers.neuro.mcw.edu
 X#
 X# Before compiling afni, install the following packages:
 X#
 X#   open-motif
 X# 
 X# To compile SUMA you will also need the following packages:
 X#
 X#   libiconv
 X#   gettext
 X#   gmake
 X#
 X#   Note:   SUMA has display problems on FreeBSD 4.8 and below that I 
 X#           have not found time to resolve.  I believe they are related
 X#           to the version of the GL libraries that ship with 4.x.
 X#
 X#           SUMA works fine under FreeBSD 4.9 with GeForce drivers installed
 X#           and under FreeBSD 5.1.
 X#
 X#   Note:   The SUMA build process (as of Aug, 2003) requires GNU make,
 X#           which is /usr/local/bin/gmake on BSD systems.  
 X#           Be sure the MAKE macro below is set to gmake.
 X#
 X#   Note:   Compilation of netcdf-3.5.0 may fail due to m4's lack of
 X#           support for the -B option.  Remove the -B10000 flag from
 X#           netcdf-3.5.0/src/configure BEFORE running make to avoid
 X#           this error.  ( Or force configure to use gm4 by reversing
 X#           the order of "m4 gm4" to "gm4 m4" everywhere in the script }
 X#           This problem has been reported to the netcdf development team.
 X#           It seems to have been resolved as of the June, 2003 afni
 X#           source distribution.
 X#
 X
 XUSE_ZLIB = -DHAVE_ZLIB
 XLZLIB    = -lz
 X
 XCC?     = cc
 XLD?     = ${CC}
 X
 XCCDEBS = -DAFNI_DEBUG -DIMSEQ_DEBUG -DDISPLAY_DEBUG -DTHD_DEBUG
 XCEXTRA = -DFreeBSD -DNO_GAMMA -DUSE_TRACING -DHAVE_XDBE -DSUMA_MOTIF_GLXAREA
 Xifeq (${ARCH}, amd64)
 XCEXTRA += -DPIC -fPIC
 Xendif
 Xifeq (${ARCH}, ia64)
 XCEXTRA += -DPIC -fPIC
 Xendif
 X
 XCFLAGS += ${CEXTRA}
 XCC     += ${CFLAGS}
 X
 XCCVOL  = ${CC}
 XCCFAST = ${CC} -O3
 XCCMIN  = ${CC}
 XCCD    = ${CC} ${CCDEBS}
 XCCSVD  = ${CC} -O0
 X
 XIFLAGS = -I. -I${X11BASE}/include -I/usr/local/include
 XLFLAGS = -s -L. -L${X11BASE}/lib
 X
 XMAKE   = gmake
 X
 XPLUGIN_SUFFIX = so
 XPLUGIN_LFLAGS = -shared
 XPLUGIN_CC     = ${CC}
 XPLFLAGS       = -s -rdynamic -L. -L${X11BASE}/lib
 X
 XAR     = /usr/bin/ar
 XRANLIB = /usr/bin/ranlib
 XTAR    = /usr/bin/tar
 XMKDIR  = /bin/mkdir
 XTAPE   = /dev/sa0
 XGZIP   = /bin/gzip
 X
 XRM = /bin/rm -f
 XMV = /bin/mv -f
 XCP = /bin/cp -f
 X
 XLINT = /usr/bin/lint -a -b -u -v -x ${IFLAGS} ${CCDEFS}
 X
 XINSTALLDIR = ./BSD
 XLIBDIR = ${INSTALLDIR}
 X
 X# for dynamic linking
 X
 XLLIBS  = -lmri -lXm -lXp -lXpm -lXext -lXmu -lXt -lX11 -lm $(LZLIB)
 X
 X# vvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvv
 X# For suma (NO STATIC LINKING OF GL libs)
 XSUMA_INCLUDE_PATH = -I${X11BASE}/include -I/usr/local/include -I./ -I../ -I../niml/ -Igts/src 
 XSUMA_LINK_PATH = -L/usr/lib -L${X11BASE}/lib -L../
 X#use -lGLw if you have libGLw.a or libGLw.so* or 
 X#  -lMesaGLw if you have Mesa's version (libMesaGLw*) of libGLw
 XSUMA_LINK_LIB = -lXm -lGLw -lGLU -lGL -lXmu -lXp -lXt -lXext -lX11 -lm $(LZLIB)
 XSUMA_MAKEFILE_NAME = SUMA_Makefile
 XSUMA_BIN_ARCHIVE = SUMA_FreeBSD.tar
 X# ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
 X
 X###############################################################
 X
 Xinclude Makefile.INCLUDE
 END-of-science/afni/files/Makefile.FreeBSD_PORT
 echo x - science/afni/files/patch-Makefile.INCLUDE
 sed 's/^X//' >science/afni/files/patch-Makefile.INCLUDE << 'END-of-science/afni/files/patch-Makefile.INCLUDE'
 X--- Makefile.INCLUDE.orig	Fri Apr 27 15:03:08 2007
 X+++ Makefile.INCLUDE	Fri Apr 27 15:03:29 2007
 X@@ -41,7 +41,7 @@
 X ## AFNI package, but included because they are useful.  Some of
 X ## them are Open Source programs, not from the AFNI group at all.
 X 
 X-EXTRAS   = cjpeg djpeg whirlgif mpeg_encode myget Xphace rmz aiv $(EXPROGS)
 X+EXTRAS   = myget Xphace rmz aiv $(EXPROGS)
 X 
 X # mpegtoppm in above list
 X 
 END-of-science/afni/files/patch-Makefile.INCLUDE
 echo x - science/afni/files/patch-SUMA-SUMA_xColBar.c
 sed 's/^X//' >science/afni/files/patch-SUMA-SUMA_xColBar.c << 'END-of-science/afni/files/patch-SUMA-SUMA_xColBar.c'
 X--- SUMA/SUMA_xColBar.c.orig	Wed Jun  6 12:42:16 2007
 X+++ SUMA/SUMA_xColBar.c	Wed Jun  6 12:43:42 2007
 X@@ -4087,6 +4087,15 @@
 X          NULL);
 X       
 X       /* open me a glxarea */
 X+      #ifdef SUMA_MOTIF_GLXAREA
 X+         SO->SurfCont->cmp_ren->cmap_wid = XtVaCreateManagedWidget("glxarea",
 X+             glwMDrawingAreaWidgetClass, rcc2,
 X+             GLwNvisualInfo, SUMAg_SVv[0].X->VISINFO,
 X+             XtNcolormap, SUMAg_SVv[0].X->CMAP,
 X+             XmNwidth,   SUMA_CMAP_WIDTH,
 X+             XmNheight,  SUMA_CMAP_HEIGHT,
 X+             NULL);
 X+      #else
 X       SO->SurfCont->cmp_ren->cmap_wid = XtVaCreateManagedWidget("glxarea",
 X                                           glwDrawingAreaWidgetClass, rcc2,
 X                                           GLwNvisualInfo, SUMAg_SVv[0].X->VISINFO,
 X@@ -4094,6 +4103,7 @@
 X                                           XmNwidth,   SUMA_CMAP_WIDTH,
 X                                           XmNheight,  SUMA_CMAP_HEIGHT,
 X                                           NULL);
 X+      #endif
 X 
 X       XtManageChild (rcc2);
 X       
 END-of-science/afni/files/patch-SUMA-SUMA_xColBar.c
 echo x - science/afni/files/patch-SUMA-SUMA_display.c
 sed 's/^X//' >science/afni/files/patch-SUMA-SUMA_display.c << 'END-of-science/afni/files/patch-SUMA-SUMA_display.c'
 X--- SUMA/SUMA_display.c.orig	Wed Jun  6 12:42:06 2007
 X+++ SUMA/SUMA_display.c	Wed Jun  6 12:45:54 2007
 X@@ -1854,22 +1854,14 @@
 X          
 X  
 X          
 X-      #ifdef SUMA_MOTIF_GLXAREA
 X-        /* Step 4. */
 X-        SUMAg_SVv[ic].X->FORM = XmCreateForm(SUMAg_SVv[ic].X->TOPLEVEL, "form", NULL, 0);
 X-        XtManageChild(SUMAg_SVv[ic].X->FORM);
 X-        SUMAg_SVv[ic].X->FRAME = XmCreateFrame(SUMAg_SVv[ic].X->FORM, "frame", NULL, 0);
 X-        XtVaSetValues(SUMAg_SVv[ic].X->FRAME,
 X-          XmNbottomAttachment, XmATTACH_FORM,
 X-          XmNtopAttachment, XmATTACH_FORM,
 X-          XmNleftAttachment, XmATTACH_FORM,
 X-          XmNrightAttachment, XmATTACH_FORM,
 X-          NULL);
 X-        XtManageChild(SUMAg_SVv[ic].X->FRAME);
 X-
 X-        /* Step 5. */
 X         SUMAg_SVv[ic].X->CMAP = SUMA_getShareableColormap(&(SUMAg_SVv[ic]));
 X 
 X+        /* create a frame to put glxarea in */
 X+        SUMAg_SVv[ic].X->FRAME = XmCreateFrame (mainw, "frame", NULL, 0);
 X+        XtManageChild(SUMAg_SVv[ic].X->FRAME);
 X+
 X+      #ifdef SUMA_MOTIF_GLXAREA
 X+        SUMA_LH("MOTIF Drawing Area");
 X         /* Step 6. */
 X          /* glwMDrawingAreaWidgetClass requires libMesaGLwM.a */
 X          SUMAg_SVv[ic].X->GLXAREA = XtVaCreateManagedWidget("glxarea",
 X@@ -1878,20 +1870,13 @@
 X           XtNcolormap, SUMAg_SVv[ic].X->CMAP,
 X           NULL);
 X       #else
 X-      /* Step 4-6. */
 X-         SUMAg_SVv[ic].X->CMAP = SUMA_getShareableColormap(&(SUMAg_SVv[ic]));
 X-
 X-         /* create a frame to put glxarea in */
 X-         SUMAg_SVv[ic].X->FRAME  = XmCreateFrame (mainw, "frame", NULL, 0);
 X-         XtManageChild(SUMAg_SVv[ic].X->FRAME);
 X-
 X+        SUMA_LH("GL Drawing Area");
 X          /* glwDrawingAreaWidgetClass requires libMesaGLw.a */
 X          SUMAg_SVv[ic].X->GLXAREA = XtVaCreateManagedWidget("glxarea",
 X           glwDrawingAreaWidgetClass, SUMAg_SVv[ic].X->FRAME,
 X           GLwNvisualInfo, SUMAg_SVv[ic].X->VISINFO,
 X           XtNcolormap, SUMAg_SVv[ic].X->CMAP,
 X           NULL);
 X-      
 X       #endif
 X 
 X           
 END-of-science/afni/files/patch-SUMA-SUMA_display.c
 echo x - science/afni/pkg-descr
 sed 's/^X//' >science/afni/pkg-descr << 'END-of-science/afni/pkg-descr'
 XThis is a port of AFNI, Analysis of Functional Neuro Imaging.  AFNI is
 Xa tool for analyzing 3 dimensional images, especially functional MRI
 Ximages used in brain mapping research.
 X
 XWWW: http://afni.nimh.nih.gov/
 X
 X-- Jason W. Bacon <bacon@smithers.neuro.mcw.edu>
 END-of-science/afni/pkg-descr
 echo x - science/afni/pkg-message
 sed 's/^X//' >science/afni/pkg-message << 'END-of-science/afni/pkg-message'
 X=============================================================================
 XRun "man afni" for information on setting up your afni environment.
 X
 XFor questions or comments regarding the FreeBSD port, please contact the
 Xport maintainer: 
 X
 Xbacon@smithers.neuro.mcw.edu
 X
 XFor AFNI configuration and usage, please visit the AFNI WEB site at 
 X
 Xhttp://afni.nimh.nih.gov.
 X
 XFor large 3dDeconvolve analyses, you may need to increase the shared
 Xmemory limit on your system.  For instructions, visit
 X
 Xhttp://www.neuro.mcw.edu/~bacon/Ports/FreeBSD/shared_mem.html
 X
 XThe program "abut" has been renamed "afni_abut" to resolve a collision
 Xwith the unixstat port.
 X=============================================================================
 END-of-science/afni/pkg-message
 echo x - science/afni/pkg-plist
 sed 's/^X//' >science/afni/pkg-plist << 'END-of-science/afni/pkg-plist'

 X############################################################################
 X# Ports collection Makefile for:   afni
 X# Date created:        11 Jan 2005
 X# Whom:                Jason W. Bacon <bacon@smithers.neuro.mcw.edu>
 X#
 X# $FreeBSD$
 X#
 X
 X############################################################################
 X# www.neuro.mcw.edu has the latest source distribution from which this port
 X# is built.  It will be updated as time permits.
 X#
 X# afni.nimh.nih.gov is the ultimate source for AFNI, and will always
 X# contain the latest source release.  If this port is not up to date,
 X# you can download the latest sources and build manually using
 X# Makefile.BSD, which is included in the source distribution.
 X
 XPORTNAME=	afni
 XPORTVERSION=	2007.06.05.1030
 XCATEGORIES=	science biology graphics
 XMASTER_SITES=	http://www.neuro.mcw.edu/~bacon/Ports/distfiles/AFNI/${PORTVERSION}/ \
 X		http://afni.nimh.nih.gov/pub/dist/tgz/
 XDISTFILES=	afni_src.tgz afni.1 \
 X		TTatlas+tlrc.BRIK.gz TTatlas+tlrc.HEAD CA_EZ_v1.3c-May0806.tgz
 XDIST_SUBDIR=	AFNI-${PORTVERSION}
 XEXTRACT_ONLY=	afni_src.tgz CA_EZ_v1.3c-May0806.tgz
 X
 XMAINTAINER=	bacon@smithers.neuro.mcw.edu
 XCOMMENT=	Advanced Functional Neuro Imaging
 X
 XRUN_DEPENDS=	cjpeg:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/jpeg \
 X		mpeg_encode:${PORTSDIR}/multimedia/mpeg_encode \
 X		whirlgif:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/whirlgif \
 X		ppmtogif:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/netpbm \
 X		endian:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/endian
 X
 X.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 X
 X.if ${ARCH} == "sparc64"
 XBROKEN=	Does not compile on sparc64: "undefined reference to '_mcount'"
 X.endif
 X
 XUSE_GL=		glw glu
 XUSE_GETTEXT=	yes
 XUSE_GMAKE=	yes
 XUSE_ICONV=	yes
 XUSE_MOTIF=	yes
 XMAKE_ENV=	CC="${CC}"
 X
 XWRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/afni_src
 XMAKEFILE=	Makefile.FreeBSD_PORT
 XALL_TARGET=	vastness suma
 X
 X###########################################################################
 X# Install parameters
 X
 XMAN1=	afni.1
 X
 XINSTALL_WRKSRC=	${WRKSRC}/BSD
 XSTAGE=		${WRKSRC}/stage
 X
 XX11R6_FILES=	coxplot/Makefile \
 X		coxplot/Makefile.f2c \
 X		3DEdge/src/Makefile \
 X		SUMA/SUMA_Makefile \
 X		edt_blur.c \
 X		suma_datasets.c \
 X		SUMA/SUMA_Load_Surface_Object.c \
 X		SUMA/SUMA_MiscFunc.c \
 X		SUMA/SUMA_ParseCommands.c \
 X		SUMA/SUMA_StripPath.c \
 X		SUMA/GLUT/libglut/glut_event.c \
 X		SUMA/SUMA_Surface_IO.c
 X
 Xpost-extract:
 X	@${CP} -f ${FILESDIR}/Makefile.FreeBSD_PORT ${WRKSRC}
 X.for f in ${X11R6_FILES}
 X	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|/usr/X11R6|$${X11BASE}|g' ${WRKSRC}/${f}
 X.endfor
 X	@${CP} ${DISTDIR}/${DIST_SUBDIR}/afni.1 ${WRKDIR}
 X	@${REINPLACE_CMD} "s|%%PREFIX%%|${PREFIX}|g" ${WRKDIR}/afni.1
 X
 Xpost-build:
 X	${MKDIR} ${STAGE}/bin \
 X		${STAGE}/scripts \
 X		${STAGE}/lib \
 X		${STAGE}/include \
 X		${STAGE}/trash \
 X		${STAGE}/doc \
 X		${STAGE}/share
 X	${MV}	${INSTALL_WRKSRC}/libf2c.a \
 X		${STAGE}/trash
 X	${MV}	${INSTALL_WRKSRC}/*.a \
 X		${INSTALL_WRKSRC}/*.so \
 X		${STAGE}/lib
 X	${MV}	${INSTALL_WRKSRC}/*.jpg \
 X		${INSTALL_WRKSRC}/*.txt \
 X		${INSTALL_WRKSRC}/AFNI.*rc \
 X		${STAGE}/share
 X	${MV}	${INSTALL_WRKSRC}/*.h \
 X		${STAGE}/include
 X	${MV}	${INSTALL_WRKSRC}/README* \
 X		${STAGE}/doc
 X	${MV}	${INSTALL_WRKSRC}/abut ${INSTALL_WRKSRC}/afni_abut
 X	for binary in `${FILE} ${INSTALL_WRKSRC}/* | fgrep 'ELF' | ${AWK} -F ':' ' { print $$1 }'` ; do \
 X		${MV} $${binary} ${STAGE}/bin ; \
 X	done
 X	${MV}	${INSTALL_WRKSRC}/* \
 X		${STAGE}/scripts
 X
 Xdo-install:
 X	${MKDIR} ${DATADIR} ${PREFIX}/lib/afni ${PREFIX}/include/afni
 X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${STAGE}/lib/* ${PREFIX}/lib/afni
 X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${STAGE}/include/* ${PREFIX}/include/afni
 X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${STAGE}/share/* ${DATADIR}
 X	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${STAGE}/bin/* ${PREFIX}/bin
 X	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${STAGE}/scripts/* ${PREFIX}/bin
 X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${DISTDIR}/${DIST_SUBDIR}/TTatlas* ${DATADIR}
 X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKDIR}/CA_EZ_v1.3c-May0806/* ${DATADIR}
 X	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKDIR}/afni.1 ${PREFIX}/man/man1
 X.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
 X	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
 X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${STAGE}/doc/* ${DOCSDIR}
 X.endif
 X
 Xpost-install:
 X	@${CAT} pkg-message
 X
 X.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
 END-of-science/afni/Makefile
 exit
